---
title: "Katherine N Thompson, PhD"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## About me

Hello!

I am postdoctoral researcher in psychiatric epidemiology who conducts quantitative research on depression, social isolation, and health equity. I am based in the Department of Sociology at Purdue University with a PhD in Social, Genetic, and Developmental Psychology from King’s College London. 

I committed to open, diverse, and communicable science. 

![](images/headshot.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="250px"}

## Connect

[GitHub](https://github.com/knthompson26)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?hl=en&user=xD4dn1IAAAAJ)

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/katherine-thompson-79a60b390/)

[Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/ktnthompson.bsky.social)

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1818-0428)

[Open Science Framework](https://osf.io/r58nz/)
